abilities.shortEffect: Absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
abilities.effect:
Whenever a Water-type move hits this Pokémon, it heals for 1/4 of its maximum HP, negating any other effect on it.

Water moves will ignore this Pokémon's Substitute.

abilities.shortEffect: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during hail.  Protects against hail damage.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon heals for 1/16 of its maximum HP after each turn during hail, and it does not take hail damage regardless of type.

abilities.shortEffect: During Hail, this Pokémon has double Speed.
abilities.effect: During Hail, this Pokémon has double Speed.
